changelog:
VOID-TOOLS v2.3.0
- NEW OFFICIAL DISCORD: discord.gg/dawa (old server down — mandatory rejoin)
- Migration screen on startup · auto-opens Discord invite
- All links, webhooks & branding updated to discord.gg/dawa

VOID-TOOLS v2.2.0
- Setup wizard re-runs when remote manifest config_rev changes (lang · theme · username)
- Boot fix: WinError 1155 when opening star screenshot (startfile → browser fallback)
- Remote sync: prefer bundled manifest when its config_rev is newer than stale CDN
- Improved boot stability and update flow

VOID-TOOLS v2.1.0
- WEBHOOK category (19 tools) · GIF/bad-word spam · discord branding
- Discord User Lookup snowflake + optional bot token in console
- Nuker webhook tools via console credentials
- Removed config-token dependency for webhook generator
